/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/yolo_inference.dir/src/yolo_inference.cpp.o -o yolo_inference  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib: /usr/local/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.9.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.9.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.9.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.9.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.9.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.9.0
